rules.description: Coverage suppressions and exclusions are forbidden
Runtime failures use the closed AgentCoreError taxonomy
Codec-backed records expose static encode and decode
Opaque identifiers have one context-owned declaration
Closed vocabularies have one canonical owner
Focused, skipped, and placeholder tests are forbidden
Every seam implementation runs one shared contract
Every durable record has one Actor and authoritative store
Cross-context references use barrels without runtime cycles
Quality checks form one nonrecursive acyclic graph
Every changed path has one exclusive worktree owner
